arts.ttl: Brighton and Brentford interest ‘can quickly become concrete’, contact made – Club ‘more willing’ to let player leave
arts.sum: Brentford previously made an attempt to sign Fiorentina defender Michael Kayode and while the Bees are still interested in the youngster, there are also links with Brighton & Hove Albion. This comes from SportItalia, who have been reported on Kayode’s situation and information from journalist Alfredo Pedulla. He’s revealed the 20-year is determined to leave The post Brighton and Brentford interest ‘can quickly become concrete’, contact made – Club ‘more willing’ to let player leave appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest keen on signing Brighton regular – Player’s valuation ‘achievable’ for Nuno’s side
arts.sum: Brighton & Hove Albion’s Pervis Estupiñán has ended up on Nottingham Forest’s transfer agenda. That’s at least what Bolavip are reporting, and they state the Reds are interested in the 26-year-old. Nuno Espírito Santo has Harry Toffolo and Álex Moreno [on loan from Aston Villa] as the two left-backs at Nottingham Forest but has used The post Nottingham Forest keen on signing Brighton regular – Player’s valuation ‘achievable’ for Nuno’s side appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Brighton have ‘taken lead’ to sign player – Club ‘waiting’ to receive Seagulls’ €13m bid
arts.sum: Brighton & Hove Albion are in the picture to sign Hammarby IF’s Bazoumana Touré. Three months ago, we covered claims from Sweden which stated the Seagulls have sent a scout to monitor the 18-year-old. On December 9th, Hammarby sporting director Mikael Hjelmberg stated at least €11m is needed to sell the Brighton target.
